message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction partially succeeded but failed on key fields and line item completeness. The date was incorrectly parsed, and one significant line item ('1 PARTY PK 18-22') was missing from the predicted line items list.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "Incorrect date extraction (predicted 2013 instead of 2016)",
    "Missing line item (the largest item '1 PARTY PK 18-22' was omitted)",
    "Incomplete line item extraction (missing raw_text and evidence_ids)"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correctly extracted 'Panda Express'.",
    "date": "Incorrect. Predicted '3/16/2013' while gold label is '2016-03-16'.",
    "address": "Correctly extracted 'Everett, WA'.",
    "subtotal": "Correctly extracted '151.00' (minor formatting difference '151.0' is acceptable).",
    "tax": "Correctly extracted '13.89'.",
    "total": "Correctly extracted '164.89'.",
    "line_items": "Failed to capture the first line item '1 PARTY PK 18-22' which contained the bulk of the total. Additionally, all predicted line items lack 'raw_text' and 'evidence_ids'."
  }
}
